evals.prompt: Restore a tall mobile app screenshot into an existing Figma Web file. The result should be pasted as a versioned frame beside prior versions and include local full-height render evidence.
evals.expected_output: A versioned SVG/Figma frame, full-height PNG render matching source dimensions, source/render comparison contact sheets, and a manifest that passes verify_manifest.py.

evals.prompt: The pasted Figma reconstruction has edge carousel cards with text alignment drift and cropped product images. Produce a corrected version and prove the repeated-card grid is consistent.
evals.expected_output: A new version with fixed repeated-card padding/baselines, region comparison crops for the problematic card area, and a manifest entry explaining remaining issues.

evals.prompt: Small SVG icons in the restored Figma file do not match the source screenshot. Improve icon fidelity and run a targeted comparison for the icon strip.
evals.expected_output: Path-based icon revisions, source/render icon-strip contact sheets, and no generic placeholder icons in the final SVG.
